video.title: Schachmann Takes Advantage as Yates Loses Ground | Giro d'Italia 2018 | Stage 18 Highlights

transcript.clean_text: welcome to the juror italian it's stage 18 today and i guess you might say time running out for those who want to make an impression and here is our break took quite a while to get established on this stage 18 and with time running out for those who want to make a noise in the general classification it could well be that they have their own private battle behind this group it has some firepower within it it also has 9 minutes and 20 of an advantage and sashman and morkhoff bridged over to what was already a handy breakaway we were describing today as bit like an ice directors there sean because every time they're getting back there's a little acceleration it also kills the mental state that doesn't it no look down towards the bottom of the group miguel lopez is still in the group tom dumoulin also looks to have moved down a little he's now on the wheel of chris froome yates still in the perfect position and group alma fdg with sebastian rykem back in front of him the swiss rider hot on the wheel of richard carapaz and the rest of the movie star team but look at this is coming right back at them and if they start to mess about the man we've written off several times already could take this sebastian comeback is the man at the front now and we have a three up sprint jackman's out the front i think he's broken them this is max jackman's big moment on the world stage a coming of age for the 24 year old from germany he did it at the volta catalonia he's now done it on a grand tour take a bow maxi million sharkman it's a wonderful second place for the n placer who thought tooth for nail throughout the vis now it's down to the gc fight pots of evil is following simon yates it's do milan trying to drop the pink jersey and we've got movement froome is struggling to keep up behind trying to get settled in and duma on one of his last chances and giving it a right all go froome catches up to the group and he attacks he needs time back as well and those on the podium are going to have to worry about that the pink jersey is losing terrain and this could be interesting because drew milan is following pots of evil the pink jersey has shown some little crack and he's losing the wheel though simon yates is losing the wheel to that group he's in crisis we wondered whether this moment would come it looked like being far from possible in the leading days up to this race but simon yates is in crisis for the first time see this is froome is there they all stand to gain in the general classification against the pink jersey and look at the time they cross the line here there it is 1102 or 1103. simon yates who looks so solid so firm on his hold of the cheer of italia today has proved that he is not infallible and there are three huge days to come at this giro yates loses between 25 and 30 seconds by a very rough estimation there and sean the giro is very much on you
